summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Singra Vox Phase 3 features including GDPR compliance, WebRTC voice signaling, mobile responsive layout, and verification of all Phase 1+2 features

ui_bugs.issue: Search dialog doesn't open with Ctrl+K shortcut

passed_tests: WebRTC Voice Signaling via WebSocket (ping/pong successful)
Account Settings modal opens from gear icon
Download Export button in Account Settings
Delete Account button with username confirmation
Mobile responsive layout (sidebar toggle, hamburger menu)
Phase 2 features (threads, search API, unread tracking, file uploads, E2EE keys, group DMs, channel overrides, temp rooms, edit history)
